# Task: Cross-Identifier Mapping with MetLinkR

Compute and tabulate per-dataset metabolite identifier mapping rates for all 10
supplementary files using the MetLinkR pipeline.

## Context

This task maps metabolite identifiers across heterogeneous databases (RefMet,
HMDB, ChEBI, PubChem) for a multi-dataset meta-analysis. Metabolite identifier
reconciliation is the first preprocessing step to enable cross-study comparisons.
